column255: Has the participant reported any adverse events?An adverse event (AE) is any unexpected or unfavorable medical occurrence in a participant during their participation in the study. The study may or may not be causally related to it. Adverse events may include but are not limited to: • Depression or anxiety• Embarrassment or worry• Intimate partner violence• Pregnancy complications• Maternal post-partum complications• Neonatal health complications
